news.title: Google is launching Search Live globally
news.summary: Search Live allows users to point their phone camera at objects to get real-time assistance, enabling back-and-forth conversations that draw on the visual context from the camera feed.

news.title: Show HN: Claude skill that evaluates B2B vendors by talking to their AI agents
news.summary:
I built this because I was evaluating software vendors and realized the process hadn't changed in 20 years: fill out forms, read G2 reviews, sit through demos designed to avoid your real questions.
The skill takes a different approach. You give it your company name and the vendors you're comparing.
